Skip to contents
shinyCRUK 0.1.0
  • Reference

CRUK value box

crukValueBox.Rd

CRUK value box

Usage

crukValueBox(
  id,
  title = "",
  value = "",
  icon = "",
  icon_colour = "#00007e",
  detail = ""
)

Arguments

id

id for the value box

title

the title

value

the value

icon

the icon of the value box

icon_colour

the colour of the icon

detail

the detail of the value box

Value

a branded CRUK value box

Examples

crukValueBox(id = "valuBox1",
             title = "Title of the first value box",
             value = "250",
             icon = shiny::icon("weight-scale"),
             detail = "detail text"
)
#> <div class="container-fluid">
#>   <div class="card bslib-card bslib-mb-spacing bslib-card-input html-fill-item html-fill-container bslib-value-box showcase-left-center" data-bslib-card-init data-require-bs-caller="card() value_box()" data-require-bs-version="5 5" id="valuBox1" style="color:#000000;background-color:#ffffff;--bslib-color-fg:#000000;--bslib-color-bg:#ffffff;">
#>     <div class="card-body bslib-gap-spacing html-fill-item html-fill-container" style="margin-top:auto;margin-bottom:auto;flex:1 1 auto; padding:0;">
#>       <div class="value-box-grid html-fill-item" style="--bslib-grid-height:auto;--bslib-grid-height-mobile:auto;---bslib-value-box-showcase-w:25%;---bslib-value-box-showcase-w-fs:1fr;---bslib-value-box-showcase-max-h:100px;---bslib-value-box-showcase-max-h-fs:67%;">
#>         <div class="value-box-showcase html-fill-item html-fill-container">
#>           <span style="color: #00007e;">
#>             <i class="fas fa-weight-scale" role="presentation" aria-label="weight-scale icon"></i>
#>           </span>
#>         </div>
#>         <div class="value-box-area html-fill-item html-fill-container">
#>           <p class="value-box-title">
#>             Title of the first value box
#>             <hr class="value-box-hr"/>
#>           </p>
#>           <div class="value-box-value value-box-value">
#>             <span style="font-family: Progress Medium;">250</span>
#>             <i class="material-symbols-outlined value-box-value-arrow">arrow_forward</i>
#>           </div>
#>           detail text
#>         </div>
#>       </div>
#>     </div>
#>     <script data-bslib-card-init>bslib.Card.initializeAllCards();</script>
#>   </div>
#> </div>
